textByHash.e8c07de762b263b8aaaab35de3b645373e9449b8: Hey it's the Hero! Wow! You're amazing, how on earth did you manage to tackle those two juvinates and Gadderanks? And the town is lovely, you've done a great job!
textByHash.3dc9676b54e77232260ecf00099fbec7979f09b5: I'm a little ill. My wife looks after me though. I help as much as I'm able, but as you can see, I'm bed ridden. Hopefully I'll get better soon.
textByHash.e60b9b7a076ef98c181f3236654c3cafa131c312: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.
textByHash.39f006d0b329bd1c0331657fa80a2ddad292768b: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.
textByHash.97ab1bf5af457dc2155d63e388f89894e9107388: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you. I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in
textByHash.c0a1f52b4d91c5e5df0eed8df55a9ffd1c8ac4e6: most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
